Scaling checklist



Use this checklist to balance your SCALE and GROWTH needs.



GROWTH Ready Checklist



The following checklist is aimed at ensuring you and your business are primed for scaling.



Some of these are less important if scaling moderately however big scaling can hurt your business.



Has your ad account spend limit been raised from the default?

Is your payment provider able to support the higher spends?

Has your ad account been operational for at least 4 weeks?

Have you implemented your avatar and account build?

Have you generated at least 5 days of consistent performance before scaling?

Is your website speed optimised?

Can your website handle larger traffic volumes?

Is your team aware of new sales/leads entering the sales pipeline?

Can you fulfill the product or service at volume?

If shipping physical goods, can your operations cope with the volumes you’re expecting?

Are Customer Services ready for more enquiries pre and post sales/lead?
